Term Sheet for Series B Financing

Issuer: TechNova Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456X), located at 123 Innovation Drive, Singapore 567890.

Investor: Future Ventures LLP, represented by Dr. Emily Tan (NRIC: S2345678B).

Amount: The Investor agrees to invest SGD 3,500,000 in exchange for Series B preferred shares.

Valuation: The pre-money valuation of the Issuer is agreed at SGD 25,000,000.

Board Representation: The Investor shall be entitled to appoint one director to the Issuer's Board.

Closing Date: The transaction is expected to close on or before December 15, 2023.

Contact: Dr. Emily Tan can be reached at +65 6123 4567 or emily.tan@futureventures.sg.

Confidentiality: All parties agree to maintain confidentiality regarding the terms of this agreement.
